ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tenants" (
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tenant */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant */,
  "tenant_status" TEXT /* Status of the tenant (active, inactive) */,
  "parent_tenant_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the parent tenant (for hierarchical structures) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tenant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tenant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_level" TEXT /* Level of the role (organizational, departmental) */,
  "is_system_role" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a system-defined role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the permission (read, write, admin) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the specific resource the permission applies to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the role */,
  "permission_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the permission */,
  "granted_by" TEXT /* User ID of the administrator who granted the permission */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* User ID of the administrator who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenant_roles" (
  "tenant_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the tenant */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the role within the tenant */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for the tenant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the user who accessed */,
  "permission_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the permission accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (successful, denied) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_status" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the role */,
  "permission_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the permission */,
  "enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the permission is enabled for this role */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the administrator who last updated the status */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
